---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  - id: publications
    type: table
    fields: [title, date]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Year"
    sort: date desc
    date-format: "YYYY"
    contents:
    - "papers/ConvertingBIMM101.qmd"
    - "papers/SchemaStudy2026.qmd"
    - "papers/TeachersParadox2025.qmd"
---

Peer-reviewed work on generative AI in undergraduate biology education, active learning, and evidence-based course design.

::: {#publications}
:::
